sent_simp: 搜索引擎会自动对句子进行分词。
sent_trad: 搜索引擎會自動對句子進行分詞。
pinyin: Sōusuǒ yǐnqíng huì zìdòng duì jùzi jìnxíng fēncí.
english: Search engines automatically segment sentences into words.

sent_simp: 她们赢得了本届奥运会的女双金牌。
sent_trad: 她們贏得了本屆奧運會的女雙金牌。
pinyin: Tāmen yíngdéle běn jiè Àoyùnhuì de nǚ shuāng jīnpái.
english: They won the women's doubles gold medal at this year's Olympics.

sent_simp: 这段代码可以复用，不需要重新写。
sent_trad: 這段代碼可以複用，不需要重新寫。
pinyin: Zhè duàn dàimǎ kěyǐ fùyòng, bù xūyào chóngxīn xiě.
english: This piece of code can be reused — no need to rewrite it.

sent_simp: 公司正在推进工作流程的规范化。
sent_trad: 公司正在推進工作流程的規範化。
pinyin: Gōngsī zhèngzài tuījìn gōngzuò liúchéng de guīfànhuà.
english: The company is working on standardizing its work processes.

sent_simp: 新兵每天都要参加高强度的军事训练。
sent_trad: 新兵每天都要參加高強度的軍事訓練。
pinyin: Xīnbīng měitiān dōu yào cānjiā gāo qiángdù de jūnshì xùnliàn.
english: New recruits take part in high-intensity military training every day.

sent_simp: 超市里的副食品种类很丰富。
sent_trad: 超市裡的副食品種類很豐富。
pinyin: Chāoshì lǐ de fùshípǐn zhǒnglèi hěn fēngfù.
english: The supermarket has a wide variety of non-staple foods.

sent_simp: 他迷上了博彩，把积蓄都输光了。
sent_trad: 他迷上了博彩，把積蓄都輸光了。
pinyin: Tā míshàngle bócǎi, bǎ jīxù dōu shūguāng le.
english: He got hooked on gambling and lost all his savings.

sent_simp: 她大学主修犯罪学，毕业后想当警察。
sent_trad: 她大學主修犯罪學，畢業後想當警察。
pinyin: Tā dàxué zhǔxiū fànzuìxué, bìyè hòu xiǎng dāng jǐngchá.
english: She majored in criminology in college and wants to become a police officer after graduating.

sent_simp: 这个项目已经发包给一家外地公司。
sent_trad: 這個項目已經發包給一家外地公司。
pinyin: Zhège xiàngmù yǐjīng fābāo gěi yī jiā wàidì gōngsī.
english: This project has already been contracted out to a company from another city.

sent_simp: 拍延时视频时要把相机固定在云台上。
sent_trad: 拍延時視頻時要把相機固定在雲臺上。
pinyin: Pāi yánshí shìpín shí yào bǎ xiàngjī gùdìng zài yúntái shàng.
english: When shooting time-lapse videos, you need to mount the camera on a tripod head.

sent_simp: 他在大学选修了一门西方艺术史课程。
sent_trad: 他在大學選修了一門西方藝術史課程。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué xuǎnxiūle yī mén xīfāng yìshùshǐ kèchéng.
english: He took a Western art history elective at university.

sent_simp: 这篇作文里有好几个错字，要改一下。
sent_trad: 這篇作文裡有好幾個錯字，要改一下。
pinyin: Zhè piān zuòwén lǐ yǒu hǎojǐ gè cuòzì, yào gǎi yīxià.
english: There are quite a few typos in this essay that need to be corrected.

sent_simp: 我们队终于进入了今年的季后赛。
sent_trad: 我們隊終於進入了今年的季後賽。
pinyin: Wǒmen duì zhōngyú jìnrùle jīnnián de jìhòusài.
english: Our team finally made it into this year's playoffs.

sent_simp: 这个城市的年均气温约为十五度。
sent_trad: 這個城市的年均氣溫約為十五度。
pinyin: Zhège chéngshì de niánjūn qìwēn yuē wéi shíwǔ dù.
english: The annual average temperature in this city is about fifteen degrees.

sent_simp: 演讲快结束时，他说了一段简短的结束语。
sent_trad: 演講快結束時，他說了一段簡短的結束語。
pinyin: Yǎnjiǎng kuài jiéshù shí, tā shuōle yī duàn jiǎnduǎn de jiéshùyǔ.
english: Near the end of his speech, he offered a brief set of concluding remarks.

sent_simp: 春节到了，合家团聚吃年夜饭。
sent_trad: 春節到了，合家團聚吃年夜飯。
pinyin: Chūnjié dào le, hé jiā tuánjù chī niányèfàn.
english: The Spring Festival has arrived — the whole family gathers for the New Year's Eve dinner.

sent_simp: 农业合作化是那个年代的重要政策。
sent_trad: 農業合作化是那個年代的重要政策。
pinyin: Nóngyè hézuòhuà shì nàge niándài de zhòngyào zhèngcè.
english: Agricultural collectivization was an important policy of that era.

sent_simp: 这家品牌成功打入了欧洲市场。
sent_trad: 這家品牌成功打入了歐洲市場。
pinyin: Zhè jiā pǐnpái chénggōng dǎrùle Ōuzhōu shìchǎng.
english: This brand successfully broke into the European market.

sent_simp: 这篇文章写得不好，还请方家多多指正。
sent_trad: 這篇文章寫得不好，還請方家多多指正。
pinyin: Zhè piān wénzhāng xiě de bù hǎo, hái qǐng fāngjiā duōduō zhǐzhèng.
english: This article is not well written — I welcome corrections from those more knowledgeable.

sent_simp: 他负责管理公司的几个专案。
sent_trad: 他負責管理公司的幾個專案。
pinyin: Tā fùzé guǎnlǐ gōngsī de jǐ gè zhuān'àn.
english: He is responsible for managing several projects at the company.

sent_simp: 书的第一章是全书的总论。
sent_trad: 書的第一章是全書的總論。
pinyin: Shū de dì yī zhāng shì quán shū de zǒnglùn.
english: The first chapter of the book is the general overview of the whole work.

sent_simp: 开业第一天，门口排起了长长的人龙。
sent_trad: 開業第一天，門口排起了長長的人龍。
pinyin: Kāiyè dì yī tiān, ménkǒu páiqǐle chángcháng de rénlóng.
english: On the first day of business, a long queue of people formed outside the door.

sent_simp: 社区正在筹建一座新的图书馆。
sent_trad: 社區正在籌建一座新的圖書館。
pinyin: Shèqū zhèngzài chóujiàn yī zuò xīn de túshūguǎn.
english: The community is preparing to build a new library.

sent_simp: 她辞掉工作，自己开了家电商店铺。
sent_trad: 她辭掉工作，自己開了家電商店鋪。
pinyin: Tā cídiào gōngzuò, zìjǐ kāile jiā diànshāng diànpù.
english: She quit her job and opened her own e-commerce store.

sent_simp: 这款产品靠广告宣传迅速打开了市场。
sent_trad: 這款產品靠廣告宣傳迅速打開了市場。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn chǎnpǐn kào guǎnggào xuānchuán xùnsù dǎkāile shìchǎng.
english: This product quickly opened up the market through advertising and promotion.

sent_simp: 贷款人需要提供收入证明才能申请。
sent_trad: 貸款人需要提供收入證明才能申請。
pinyin: Dàikuǎn rén xūyào tígōng shōurù zhèngmíng cái néng shēnqǐng.
english: The lender requires proof of income before you can apply.

sent_simp: 英国的法律体系以习惯法为基础。
sent_trad: 英國的法律體系以習慣法為基礎。
pinyin: Yīngguó de fǎlǜ tǐxì yǐ xíguànfǎ wéi jīchǔ.
english: The British legal system is based on common law.

sent_simp: 连接电池时要注意分清正极和负极。
sent_trad: 連接電池時要注意分清正極和負極。
pinyin: Liánjiē diànchí shí yào zhùyì fēnqīng zhèngjí hé fùjí.
english: When connecting a battery, pay attention to telling the positive and negative poles apart.

sent_simp: 市长上任后推出了一系列新政。
sent_trad: 市長上任後推出了一系列新政。
pinyin: Shìzhǎng shàngrèn hòu tuīchūle yī xìliè xīnzhèng.
english: After taking office, the mayor introduced a series of new policies.

sent_simp: 他被人假冒客服骗走了两万块钱。
sent_trad: 他被人假冒客服騙走了兩萬塊錢。
pinyin: Tā bèi rén jiǎmào kèfú piànzǒule liǎng wàn kuài qián.
english: He was swindled out of twenty thousand yuan by someone posing as customer service.

sent_simp: 这家公司在境内外都有业务。
sent_trad: 這家公司在境內外都有業務。
pinyin: Zhè jiā gōngsī zài jìng nèi wài dōu yǒu yèwù.
english: This company has operations both within and outside the country.

sent_simp: 他因为迟到太多次被学校记过处分。
sent_trad: 他因為遲到太多次被學校記過處分。
pinyin: Tā yīnwèi chídào tài duō cì bèi xuéxiào jìguò chǔfèn.
english: He received a demerit from the school for being late too many times.

sent_simp: 医生开了一个治咳嗽的成方给他。
sent_trad: 醫生開了一個治咳嗽的成方給他。
pinyin: Yīshēng kāile yī gè zhì késou de chéngfāng gěi tā.
english: The doctor prescribed a set TCM formula to treat his cough.

sent_simp: 他是这栋大楼的总管，什么事都归他处理。
sent_trad: 他是這棟大樓的總管，什麼事都歸他處理。
pinyin: Tā shì zhè dòng dàlóu de zǒngguǎn, shénme shì dōu guī tā chǔlǐ.
english: He's the building manager — everything is handled by him.

sent_simp: 在校学生可以享受半价优惠。
sent_trad: 在校學生可以享受半價優惠。
pinyin: Zài xiào xuésheng kěyǐ xiǎngshòu bànjià yōuhuì.
english: Students currently enrolled in school can enjoy a half-price discount.

sent_simp: 历史书里提到了当年白区地下党的活动。
sent_trad: 歷史書裡提到了當年白區地下黨的活動。
pinyin: Lìshǐ shū lǐ tídàole dāngnián báiqū dìxià dǎng de huódòng.
english: The history book mentions the underground party activities in the White areas back then.

sent_simp: 这组数据的均值是八十五分。
sent_trad: 這組數據的均值是八十五分。
pinyin: Zhè zǔ shùjù de jūnzhí shì bāshíwǔ fēn.
english: The average value of this data set is eighty-five points.

sent_simp: 我刚刚在网上下单买了一双跑鞋。
sent_trad: 我剛剛在網上下單買了一雙跑鞋。
pinyin: Wǒ gānggāng zài wǎngshàng xià dān mǎile yī shuāng pǎoxié.
english: I just placed an order online for a pair of running shoes.

sent_simp: 辩论赛中，正方认为城市生活更幸福。
sent_trad: 辯論賽中，正方認為城市生活更幸福。
pinyin: Biànlùnsài zhōng, zhèngfāng rènwéi chéngshì shēnghuó gèng xìngfú.
english: In the debate, the affirmative side argued that city life is happier.

sent_simp: 便利店里那位小姐姐服务态度特别好。
sent_trad: 便利店裡那位小姐姐服務態度特別好。
pinyin: Biànlìdiàn lǐ nà wèi xiǎo jiě jiě fúwù tàidu tèbié hǎo.
english: The young lady at the convenience store has a really great attitude.
